puzzleDescription: Learn how to find the largest number in an array by comparing each element one by one.
objective: Given the array 'scores', find the largest number and print it.
hints: Start your loop from 'i = 1' since we already have 'scores[0]'.
Inside the loop, use an if statement: 'if (scores[i] > max)'.
If the condition is true, update 'max' with the new value: 'max = scores[i];'.
